errors.unknownStep: We couldn't find that setup step. Take me back to the start.
errors.slugTaken: That web address is already taken.
errors.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
errors.createFailed: Something went wrong creating your business. Please try again.
errors.rewardRequired: Set the reward customers will earn.

welcome.title: Welcome to Stampeo
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your loyalty program ready.
welcome.body: In a few minutes you'll have a branded digital card live in your customers' wallets — and a first stamp sent to your own phone.

identity.title: Identity
identity.subtitle: Tell us what your business is called and where to find it.

fields.name: Business name
fields.slugHelp: Your card link will be stampeo.app/{slug}

type.title: What kind of business?
type.subtitle: Pick the closest match — we'll tune templates and copy to fit.

size.title: How big is your team?
size.subtitle: Helps us recommend who should have a scanner account.

locations.title: How many locations?
locations.subtitle: Each location can use the same loyalty card.

objectives.title: What's your main goal?
objectives.subtitle: We'll keep tips and metrics focused on what matters most.

program.title: Set up your loyalty program
program.subtitle: Decide how many stamps it takes and what customers earn.

dataCollection.title: What to collect from customers
dataCollection.subtitle: Pick the fields you want on the signup form.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Add your logo and colors. Defaults work — you can refine later.

icon.title: Notification icon
icon.subtitle: Pick the icon customers see when your card pings them — typically your logo.

transactional.title: Default messages
transactional.subtitle: Customise the text sent on each stamp, reward unlocked, and reward redeemed.

milestones.title: Custom milestones
milestones.subtitle: Optional. Add bonus pings at specific stamp counts (e.g. "halfway there").

first-customer.title: Get your first customer
first-customer.subtitle: Share your signup link or scan the QR with your own phone to install the card.

live-stamp.title: Send your first stamp
live-stamp.subtitle: Open the customers list, find yourself, and tap to add a stamp.
live-stamp.cardBody: Once a customer has installed the card, stamps trigger a push notification on their phone. Try it with your own.

first-broadcast.title: Send your first broadcast
first-broadcast.subtitle: Broadcasts push a message to every customer who installed your card.
first-broadcast.cardBody: Pick a time, write your message, preview what customers see on their lock screen.

team.title: Invite your team
team.subtitle: Add admins or scanners — they'll be able to stamp customers at the counter.
team.inviteHint: Send an email invite. They'll get a scanner login.

plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.subtitle: You're on a 30-day Pro trial. Pick a plan now or keep exploring on the trial.
plan.downgradeBody: Some things you've set up won't be available on Starter:
